prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a Blades in the Dark inspired gaslamp fantasy setting. Terrain type: single_continent. Draw one immense fictional continent in industrial gothic cartography: perpetual supernatural darkness, black canals, leaky industrial waterways, smog and fog, flickering gas lamps, electroplasmic lightning towers, leviathan-blood refineries, lightning rail lines, walled canal city districts, dockyards, factories, ghost-lit sectors, criminal faction territories, noble estates, Bluecoat precinct fortresses, and haunted deathlands beyond the walls. Span many climates and biomes despite the dark sunless world: rain-soaked industrial coast, cold moorland, dead ash wastes, fungal wetlands, jagged mountains, drowned forests, salt marsh deltas, black beaches, toxic refinery barrens, storm cliffs, and pale ghost fields. Coastline must be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, river deltas, fjords, barrier islands, reefs, and sea caves. Add irregular offshore islands in uneven clusters, all varied in size and shape: prison hulks, smuggler isles, leviathan hunter ports, haunted ruins, lighthouse towers, and abandoned dock-forts. Large detailed parchment-and-ink atlas, soot-black and blue electroplasm glow, ornate gothic compass, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
